transactions.description: New York Yankees placed LF Jasson Domínguez on the 10-day injured list. Left shoulder AC joint sprain.
New York Yankees optioned RHP Brendan Beck to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees recalled RHP Kervin Castro from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees recalled CF Spencer Jones from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
